name: Homemade Hot Roll Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Stir together to distribute evenly.
3. Transfer the mixture to a large airtight container.
4. Label with date and contents.
5. Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 6-8 months.
Makes about 22 cups Homemade Hot Roll Mix.
Whole Wheat Hot Roll Mix Variation:
1. Combine 9 cups whole-wheat flour and 8 cups unbleached flour.
2. Decrease sugar to 1 cup.
3. Substitute packed brown sugar for granulated, if desired.
4. Store in a cool, dry place; use within a week.
5. Refrigerate or freeze (up to 6 months) for longer storage.
Makes about 18 cups Whole Wheat Hot Roll Mix.
